---
title: "Machine Learning"
subtitle: "Housing Data & Star Wars Survey"
---

# Housing Data
## Classification
Built a Random Forest Classifier to predict whether a house was built before 1980, achieving over 93% accuracy.

## Regression (Stretch)
Combined original housing data with a neighborhood dataset. Built a Random Forest Regressor to predict the exact year a house was built, evaluating the model using Mean Absolute Error (MAE), Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE), R-squared metrics, and residual plots.

# Star Wars Survey
## Advanced Modeling
Trained and compared multiple models, ultimately using a tuned Gradient Boosting Classifier to predict whether a survey respondent makes over $50,000 a year based purely on their demographic and Star Wars-related answers, actively combating data leakage and overfitting.
